title: Tokyo Mighty Guy
original_title: 二階堂卓也　銀座無頼帖　銀座旋風児
overview: The first in the Ginza Whirlwind Child series. A poignant action giant depicting the activities of Mait Guy Akira, who calls people to Ginza Boring Man, popular and longing everywhere, and who is on the side of justice of the divine ghost.
